notes: Builds the LLM-PLC-AS framework and benchmarks 21 prompting techniques across 25 curated PLC use cases, evaluating generated code via BLEU (lexical), LLM-in-the-Loop (LLM-as-judge), and Human-in-the-Loop expert review. HITL uses certified PLC engineers as expert code raters (inter-rater agreement reported), which is expert evaluation of artifacts rather than a survey/interview/user-study, so human_subjects is coded false. Also releases an annotated dataset (Zenodo).
